fa-highlighter-line.appearanceId: a marker or highlighter pen shown at a diagonal angle with a broad flat chisel tip and a cap at the other end; angled felt-tip marker silhouette with a wide wedge nib
fa-highlighter-line.functionalityId: highlights or marks a line of text in a document; applies a colored emphasis stroke to selected content
fa-highlighter-line.intentId: annotate or highlight a specific line of text; draw attention to a passage in a document

fa-hiking.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette walking uphill with a backpack on the shoulders and a walking stick or trekking pole extended forward; striding person outline with a pack and a staff
fa-hiking.functionalityId: marks a hiking trail, route, or outdoor activity; represents a walking or trekking recreational option
fa-hiking.intentId: find a hiking trail or outdoor walking route; plan a trekking or nature walk activity

fa-hill-avalanche.appearanceId: a triangular hill or mountain outline with a large falling mass of snow or debris rolling down the slope and small lines indicating motion; sloped terrain silhouette with a cascading slide of material
fa-hill-avalanche.functionalityId: indicates an avalanche hazard or natural disaster warning on a terrain map; marks a zone at risk of snow or rock slide
fa-hill-avalanche.intentId: warn about an avalanche or landslide hazard; alert users to a natural disaster risk in a mountainous area

fa-hill-rockslide.appearanceId: a triangular hill outline with jagged rock shapes tumbling down its slope and motion lines suggesting a slide; sloped terrain silhouette with falling boulder fragments on the face
fa-hill-rockslide.functionalityId: indicates a rockslide or falling rock hazard on a terrain map; marks a zone at risk of geologic slide activity
fa-hill-rockslide.intentId: warn about a rockslide or falling rock danger; alert users to unstable terrain or geologic hazard

fa-hippo.appearanceId: a wide rounded hippo body silhouette with a massive blocky head, small ears, short stubby legs, and a tiny tail; heavy quadruped outline with a broad snout and barrel-shaped torso
fa-hippo.functionalityId: represents a hippopotamus in a wildlife or zoo app; marks an animal category related to large African mammals
fa-hippo.intentId: explore hippopotamus or African wildlife content; access zoo or large mammal information

fa-history.appearanceId: a circular clock face with hands and a curved counterclockwise arrow wrapping around the outside of the circle; round timepiece outline with a rotating back-arrow indicating time reversal
fa-history.functionalityId: opens a browsing or activity history list; navigates back to previously viewed items or actions
fa-history.intentId: review past actions or browsing history; access a log of previous activity

fa-hockey-mask.appearanceId: a rounded protective mask shape with a domed forehead, two oval eye cutouts, and a grill or bar pattern over the mouth and chin area; face-covering silhouette with eye holes and a ventilated lower section
fa-hockey-mask.functionalityId: represents a hockey goalie mask or protective gear; marks a goaltender or hockey equipment category
fa-hockey-mask.intentId: access hockey goalie gear or protective equipment content; find goaltender-related sports items

fa-hockey-puck.appearanceId: a flat circular disc shape with a slightly raised edge representing a hockey puck in profile or top view; solid round cylinder outline used in ice hockey
fa-hockey-puck.functionalityId: represents a hockey game element or ice hockey sport category; marks a puck or ice sport item
fa-hockey-puck.intentId: access ice hockey content or game scores; find hockey-related sports information

fa-hockey-stick-puck.appearanceId: an ice hockey stick with a long handle and angled blade positioned next to or in contact with a small circular puck; hockey stick silhouette with a blade tip touching a flat round disc
fa-hockey-stick-puck.functionalityId: represents an ice hockey sport action or game scene; marks a hockey play, team, or sport category
fa-hockey-stick-puck.intentId: access ice hockey game content or team information; find hockey sport categories or game details

fa-hockey-sticks.appearanceId: two crossed ice hockey sticks with handles extending diagonally and angled blades at the bottom forming an X pattern; a pair of hockey stick silhouettes crossed over each other
fa-hockey-sticks.functionalityId: marks an ice hockey team, equipment, or sport category; represents the sport of hockey with crossed equipment
fa-hockey-sticks.intentId: access ice hockey team or sport content; browse hockey equipment or league information

fa-holly-berry.appearanceId: two or three rounded berries clustered together with several pointed holly leaves radiating around them; small circular fruit shapes surrounded by spiky-edged leaf silhouettes
fa-holly-berry.functionalityId: marks a Christmas or winter holiday theme in an app; decorates content with a festive holly and berry motif
fa-holly-berry.intentId: indicate a Christmas or holiday seasonal theme; add festive holly decoration to content

fa-home.appearanceId: a simple house shape with a triangular peaked roof over a square or rectangular body and a centered door rectangle at the base; basic pitched-roof house silhouette with a single front door
fa-home.functionalityId: navigates to the home page or main dashboard; returns the user to the root or starting view
fa-home.intentId: go to the home page or main screen; return to the primary starting point of an application

fa-home-blank.appearanceId: a simple house shape with a triangular peaked roof over a rectangular body and no door or window details, leaving the facade entirely blank; plain pitched-roof house silhouette with an empty undecorated front wall
fa-home-blank.functionalityId: represents a generic or empty home placeholder; marks a home slot that has no user or content assigned
fa-home-blank.intentId: indicate an unassigned or empty home slot; use as a placeholder for a home location not yet configured

fa-home-heart.appearanceId: a simple house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a heart symbol centered on the front facade; basic pitched-roof house silhouette with a love heart overlay on the front wall
fa-home-heart.functionalityId: marks a home as a favorite or loved location; saves a home address to a favorites or wishlist
fa-home-heart.intentId: save or favorite a home location; indicate a loved or preferred home address

fa-home-lg.appearanceId: a larger or more detailed house shape with a pitched roof, a visible chimney on one side, a front door, and small window openings; fuller pitched-roof home silhouette with chimney and window details
fa-home-lg.functionalityId: navigates to a home page with a more prominent or expanded layout; represents a full-featured home or primary residence
fa-home-lg.intentId: go to a detailed or expanded home page view; represent a primary or full-sized home location

fa-home-user.appearanceId: a simple house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a small person or user silhouette centered on the front facade; basic pitched-roof house silhouette with a human figure overlay on the front wall
fa-home-user.functionalityId: links a user account to a home address or residence; shows which user is associated with a home location
fa-home-user.intentId: associate a user with a home address; access a personalized home profile for a specific user

fa-honey-pot.appearanceId: a round squat pot or jar with a narrow opening at the top and a wide rounded body, often with honeycomb or bee decorations or a dripping honey accent; ceramic crock silhouette with a small mouth and a bulging belly
fa-honey-pot.functionalityId: marks a honey or natural sweetener ingredient in a recipe app; represents a honeypot concept in a security or networking context
fa-honey-pot.intentId: find honey or natural sweetener recipes; access honeypot security decoy settings in a network app

fa-hood-cloak.appearanceId: a hooded cloak or cape shape with a large pointed hood at the top, sweeping fabric panels on each side, and no visible face; flowing garment silhouette with a prominent pointed cowl
fa-hood-cloak.functionalityId: represents a stealth mode, anonymity, or hidden identity feature; marks a cloaked or disguised user status
fa-hood-cloak.intentId: activate an anonymous or hidden identity mode; indicate stealth or incognito status in an application

fa-horizontal-rule.appearanceId: a single long horizontal straight line spanning the full width; a thin flat divider line with no decoration
fa-horizontal-rule.functionalityId: inserts a horizontal rule or divider line into a document; adds a visual separator between sections of content
fa-horizontal-rule.intentId: separate sections of a document with a divider line; insert a horizontal rule in a text editor or layout

fa-horse.appearanceId: a horse body silhouette in side profile with a flowing mane, four legs, and a long tail; full equine body outline showing head, neck, torso, and legs
fa-horse.functionalityId: marks an equestrian, horse racing, or animal category; represents a horse in a nature, sports, or farm app
fa-horse.intentId: access horse racing, equestrian, or animal content; find information about horses in a sports or farm app

fa-horse-head.appearanceId: a horse head silhouette in side profile with a pointed ear, flowing mane along the neck, and a long snout; equine head and neck outline with mane hair detail
fa-horse-head.functionalityId: marks a horse or equestrian category focused on the animal's head; represents a thoroughbred or horse breed in a racing or animal app
fa-horse-head.intentId: access horse breed or equestrian head-focused content; find thoroughbred or horse-related information

fa-horse-saddle.appearanceId: a Western or English riding saddle shape with a raised pommel at the front, a seat depression in the middle, and a cantle at the back, with stirrup loops visible; side-profile saddle silhouette with pommel, seat, and stirrup detail
fa-horse-saddle.functionalityId: marks equestrian gear or riding equipment in a sports or outdoors app; represents saddlery or horse-riding accessories
fa-horse-saddle.intentId: access horse riding gear or equestrian equipment; browse saddlery or riding accessory options

fa-hose.appearanceId: a coiled or straight flexible tube shape with an open nozzle end representing a garden or fire hose; cylindrical pipe silhouette with a curved or looped body and a tapered spray tip
fa-hose.functionalityId: marks a water hose or watering tool in a garden or utilities app; represents a hose or pipe connection in a plumbing context
fa-hose.intentId: find garden watering tools or hose accessories; access plumbing or water line connection options

fa-hose-reel.appearanceId: a circular spool or reel with a hose wrapped around it and a handle or mounting bracket on the side; round drum silhouette with coiled tubing wound around it
fa-hose-reel.functionalityId: marks a hose reel or garden water management tool; represents a retractable hose storage device
fa-hose-reel.intentId: manage or store a garden hose on a reel; access hose storage or retractable hose options

fa-hospital.appearanceId: a building facade with a large H letter displayed prominently on the front and a rectangular multi-story structure outline; institutional building silhouette with a hospital H sign on the face
fa-hospital.functionalityId: marks a hospital location on a map or in a directory; navigates to a healthcare facility or emergency services section
fa-hospital.intentId: find a nearby hospital or emergency healthcare facility; access hospital location or emergency services information

fa-hospital-user.appearanceId: a hospital building facade with an H sign and a small person or user silhouette overlaid or beside the structure; institutional building outline with a human figure badge indicating a patient or staff member
fa-hospital-user.functionalityId: links a patient or user to a hospital record or facility; manages a hospital patient profile or staff account
fa-hospital-user.intentId: access a patient or staff profile associated with a hospital; manage a user's healthcare facility records

fa-hospitals.appearanceId: two hospital building facades side by side or overlapping, each showing a rectangular structure with an H marker; a pair of institutional building silhouettes grouped together
fa-hospitals.functionalityId: displays a list of multiple hospitals or healthcare facilities; marks a region with multiple hospital locations
fa-hospitals.intentId: browse or compare multiple hospital facilities; access a list of healthcare facilities in an area

fa-hot-tub.appearanceId: a large rectangular or oval tub shape with wavy lines or bubbles inside indicating hot water, and a person figure seated inside; soaking tub silhouette with a human figure and water bubble marks
fa-hot-tub.functionalityId: marks a hot tub or jacuzzi amenity at a hotel or spa; indicates a hydrotherapy or hot water relaxation feature
fa-hot-tub.intentId: find a hotel or resort with a hot tub or jacuzzi; access spa or hydrotherapy amenity information

fa-hotdog.appearanceId: a long oval sausage shape nestled inside an elongated bun, shown in side profile; a frankfurter silhouette inside a hot dog roll outline
fa-hotdog.functionalityId: marks a hot dog or fast food item in a restaurant or menu app; represents a sausage or ballpark food category
fa-hotdog.intentId: find hot dog or fast food options; access ballpark or street food menu items

fa-hotel.appearanceId: a multi-story building facade with a rectangular grid of window rows and a front entrance at the base; tall commercial building silhouette with evenly spaced window openings
fa-hotel.functionalityId: marks a hotel or lodging location on a map; navigates to hotel booking or accommodation search
fa-hotel.intentId: find a hotel or lodging option; book or search for accommodations in a travel app

fa-hourglass.appearanceId: an hourglass shape with two triangular chambers connected at a narrow neck and a rectangular frame around them, with sand roughly half-distributed between both chambers; symmetrical double-cone vessel with equal sand fill in upper and lower sections
fa-hourglass.functionalityId: represents a timer or waiting state in an application; indicates that a process is in progress or time is being counted
fa-hourglass.intentId: track elapsed time or indicate a loading or waiting state; show that a timed process is active

fa-hourglass-1.appearanceId: an hourglass shape within a rectangular frame with sand filling most of the upper chamber and only a small amount in the lower chamber, with grains falling through the neck; double-cone vessel with sand predominantly in the top section
fa-hourglass-1.functionalityId: represents a timer near the start with most time remaining; indicates that a process has just begun or has plenty of time left
fa-hourglass-1.intentId: show that a timer has just started or has significant time remaining; indicate an early stage of a timed process

fa-hourglass-2.appearanceId: an hourglass shape within a rectangular frame with sand split roughly halfway between the upper and lower chambers, with grains flowing through the central neck; double-cone vessel with sand equally divided between top and bottom sections
fa-hourglass-2.functionalityId: represents a timer at the halfway point with half the time elapsed; indicates that a process is midway through
fa-hourglass-2.intentId: show that a timer or process is approximately halfway complete; indicate a midpoint in a timed operation

fa-hourglass-3.appearanceId: an hourglass shape within a rectangular frame with sand filling most of the lower chamber and only a small amount remaining in the upper chamber; double-cone vessel with sand predominantly in the bottom section
fa-hourglass-3.functionalityId: represents a timer near expiration with very little time remaining; indicates that a process is almost complete
fa-hourglass-3.intentId: show that a timer is nearly finished or a process is almost done; indicate that time is running out on a timed operation

fa-hourglass-clock.appearanceId: an hourglass shape with sand flowing through it and a small clock face badge overlaid at the lower corner; double-cone vessel silhouette with a timepiece indicator badge
fa-hourglass-clock.functionalityId: represents a scheduled timer or time-tracked process; combines countdown functionality with a clock schedule
fa-hourglass-clock.intentId: schedule a timed process or track duration with a clock; manage a timer event tied to a specific time of day

fa-house-building.appearanceId: a residential house with a peaked roof on the left beside a taller flat-roofed commercial building on the right; a small pitched-roof home silhouette adjacent to a multi-story rectangular structure
fa-house-building.functionalityId: represents a mixed residential and commercial property type; marks a real estate listing combining home and building use
fa-house-building.intentId: browse mixed-use or residential-commercial property listings; indicate a real estate category combining home and building types

fa-house-chimney-blank.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof, a chimney on one side, and a completely blank undecorated front facade with no door or window markings; chimney-equipped home silhouette with an empty plain front wall
fa-house-chimney-blank.functionalityId: represents a generic home with a chimney but no additional details; marks a blank home template with chimney structure
fa-house-chimney-blank.intentId: use a blank chimney house as a placeholder or template; indicate an unassigned home slot with a chimney

fa-house-chimney-heart.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof, a chimney on one side, and a heart symbol centered on the front facade; chimney-equipped home silhouette with a love heart overlay on the front wall
fa-house-chimney-heart.functionalityId: marks a chimney home as a loved or favorited location; saves a house with a chimney to a favorites or wishlist
fa-house-chimney-heart.intentId: favorite or love a chimney house location; indicate a cherished home with a chimney feature

fa-house-chimney-user.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof, a chimney on one side, and a person or user silhouette centered on the front facade; chimney-equipped home outline with a human figure badge on the front wall
fa-house-chimney-user.functionalityId: associates a user with a home that has a chimney; links a resident profile to a specific chimney house
fa-house-chimney-user.intentId: assign a user to a chimney house address; access a personalized home profile for a chimney residence

fa-house-chimney-window.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof, a chimney on one side, and a square window opening visible on the front facade; chimney-equipped home silhouette with a window cutout on the front wall
fa-house-chimney-window.functionalityId: represents a home with a chimney and window detail; marks a residential property with specific architectural features
fa-house-chimney-window.intentId: indicate a home with chimney and window features; access architectural details of a chimney house listing

fa-house-circle-check.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a small filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid at the lower right corner; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a confirmation circle badge
fa-house-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a home as verified, confirmed, or approved; indicates that a home address or property has passed a check
fa-house-circle-check.intentId: confirm or verify a home address or property listing; indicate that a home has been approved or validated

fa-house-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark badge overlaid at the lower right corner; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with an alert circle badge
fa-house-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: indicates a warning or alert associated with a home address or property; marks a residence with a pending issue or caution flag
fa-house-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert the user to a problem or issue with a home; flag a property with a warning that requires attention

fa-house-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a small filled circle containing an X mark badge overlaid at the lower right corner; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a rejection or removal circle badge
fa-house-circle-xmark.functionalityId: marks a home as removed, rejected, or unavailable; indicates that a home address or property has been denied or deleted
fa-house-circle-xmark.intentId: remove or reject a home address or property listing; indicate that a home is unavailable or has been denied

fa-house-crack.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a jagged crack or fracture line running down the front facade; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a structural damage fissure on the wall
fa-house-crack.functionalityId: indicates structural damage or a hazard warning for a home; marks a property as damaged or in need of repair
fa-house-crack.intentId: report or flag structural damage to a home; indicate that a property has been damaged or is unsafe

fa-house-damage.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and visible damage such as a cracked wall, broken section, or missing piece on the facade; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with signs of deterioration or destruction
fa-house-damage.functionalityId: indicates general damage or disaster impact on a home; marks a property as affected by an event causing structural harm
fa-house-damage.intentId: report or document home damage after a disaster; indicate that a property has sustained significant damage

fa-house-day.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a small sun or sunburst symbol positioned above or beside the roofline; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a daylight sun badge
fa-house-day.functionalityId: represents daytime home automation settings or solar energy features; marks a home with daytime or solar-powered status
fa-house-day.intentId: manage daytime home automation or solar energy settings; access a home's daytime or sun-related features

fa-house-fire.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a flame or fire shape rising from the top or engulfing part of the structure; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a fire or flame badge
fa-house-fire.functionalityId: indicates a fire hazard or active fire emergency at a home; marks a property as on fire or at risk from fire
fa-house-fire.intentId: report a home fire or fire hazard emergency; alert users to a fire danger at a residential property

fa-house-flag.appearanceId: a house shape with a triangular peaked roof and a rectangular flag or pennant attached at the upper corner or roofline; basic pitched-roof home silhouette with a flag badge extending from the top
fa-house-flag.functionalityId: marks a home with a flagged status or country/region association; indicates a home listing that has been flagged or tagged
fa-house-flag.intentId: flag a home for review or associate it with a region; mark a property listing with a status flag
